company.cats: 户外地垫 Outdoor Rug、浴室垫 Bath Mat、露台垫 Patio Rug、RV 房车垫、宠物垫 Pet Mat、沙滩/野餐垫 Beach/Picnic Mat
company.bigClients: Aldi、Lidl、The Home Depot、K-mart 等欧美连锁零售商

certs.d: 由 TÜV Rheinland 颁发的供应商认证（店铺首页 by TÜVRheinland 标识）。
100% 产品质量与准时发货保障，支持安全付款与退款政策。
已通过 Alibaba.com 实地核验（Onsite Check），第三方机构确认法人资质。
部分大尺寸 RV 雨棚地垫产品已标注 CE Certified for European Market。
主打 Recycled Polypropylene（再生 PP）环保材质，支持原材料识别与可追溯。
提供来料检验、成品检验、原材料识别与追溯等全流程质控服务。
支持图纸定制（Drawing-based）与打样定制（Sample-based），全定制 + ODM 服务。

intel.d: 主要服务 Aldi、Lidl、The Home Depot、K-mart 等欧美大型连锁零售商，具备大宗 OEM/ODM 供货经验，适合走商超采购、批发分销渠道的买家。
北美（RV 房车文化盛行，露营/庭院垫需求大）、西欧（露台/花园场景）、大洋洲（户外生活）、中东（祈祷垫 Prayer Rug 需求）、南欧。
RV 房车露营、庭院露台、泳池边、野餐、沙滩、宠物喂食垫、儿童游戏垫、室内外通用、清真祈祷垫。
买家高频关注：reversible(双面)、washable(可水洗)、waterproof(防水)、UV-resistant(抗UV)、recycled/eco-friendly(环保)、non-slip(防滑)、lightweight(轻便)、foldable(可折叠)。
主力价格带 US$2-20/件，起订量多为 200-500 件；存在 MOQ 低至 3 件的样品款（如热销 526 sold 的几何双面垫），可作为引流款撬动小单试单买家。
12 年工厂 + 25000m² + 200 设备 + 服务过 Aldi/Lidl/Home Depot —— 用大牌背书快速建立信任；100% 准时发货 + ≤3h 响应抢占询盘转化窗口。

scripts.c: Hi {Name}, thank you for your interest in our outdoor rugs! We are Aiyisi, a 12-year factory in Zhejiang specializing in reversible recycled-PP outdoor mats, serving Aldi, Lidl & The Home Depot. Could you share: 1) target size, 2) quantity, 3) destination country? I'll send you a tailored quote and free design catalog within 3 hours.
We are a TÜV-certified custom manufacturer with 25,000 m² factory, 200+ machines and 100% on-time delivery. Big retail clients include Aldi, Lidl, The Home Depot and K-mart.

scripts.t: 中文-内部询盘转化要点
scripts.c: 询盘进来 3 小时内必回（响应≤3h 是我们的核心优势）。首回必问三要素：尺寸 / 数量 / 目的国，并立刻甩大牌客户背书 + 免费图册建立信任。

Based on your request, our FOB Ningbo price is: {Size} reversible PP outdoor rug at USD {Price}/pc, MOQ {MOQ} pcs. Price includes recycled-PP material, jacquard weaving and standard export packing. Lead time: 25-35 days after deposit. Shall I arrange a sample for you?

We offer tiered pricing — the larger the order, the better the unit price. For example: 200 pcs at USD X, 500 pcs at USD Y, 1000+ pcs at USD Z. Let me know your target volume and I'll optimize the best price for you.

I understand price matters. Our rugs use 100% recycled PP and pass UV & anti-aging tests, so they last 2-3x longer than cheap imports — lower return rate for your store. If budget is tight, we can adjust pile height or size to fit your target price. What's your ideal landed cost?

For custom designs: 1) send us your pattern/logo or size, 2) we make a sample in 7-10 days, 3) sample fee USD {fee} (refundable on bulk order). We support drawing-based & sample-based customization. Reversible double-sided design and any size are available.
Yes, we provide full OEM/ODM service — custom size, pattern, color, logo weaving and private-label packaging with carry bag. Our 2 R&D engineers can turn your idea into a production-ready design.
客户要定制图案先确认：是否涉及版权图案（卡通/品牌LOGO需授权，规避侵权）；尺寸是否标准（非标尺寸影响开机成本与MOQ）；颜色批次差异需提前告知。
Standard lead time is 25-35 days after deposit for MOQ orders. Large orders (1x40HQ) about 35-45 days. We guarantee 100% on-time shipment — it's tracked in our store record.
To calculate freight, our rugs are lightweight and foldable — a 20GP fits roughly {qty} pcs depending on size. Tell me your size and I'll confirm exact loading quantity and CBM.
We accept FOB, CIF and DDP. For Trade Assurance orders you get 100% protection on quality and on-time shipment. Which Incoterm do you prefer?
Our signature feature: fully reversible design — two looks in one rug. Customers flip it for a fresh pattern, doubling the value. Great selling point for retail shelves.
Made from recycled polypropylene — eco-friendly, 100% washable (just hose it down), waterproof, UV-resistant and anti-aging. Perfect for RV, patio, camping, beach and poolside.
对欧美买家按此优先级讲卖点：1) reversible 双面 2) recycled/eco 环保(欧盟买家最吃) 3) washable/waterproof 易打理 4) UV-resistant 耐用 5) lightweight/foldable 物流友好。
Hi {Name}, just following up on the outdoor rug quote I sent. Are there any questions I can help with? I can also send you our best-selling designs and a free sample arrangement to help you decide.
Hi {Name}, hope you received our sample! How do you find the quality and texture? If everything looks good, I can lock in current pricing and reserve production slots for you before our peak season.
Spring/summer is peak season for outdoor rugs and our lines fill up fast. To secure your delivery date, I'd recommend placing the order soon. Shall I prepare the PI for you?

I'm sorry to hear that. Please send photos/video of the issue and the order number. We take quality seriously — all orders are protected by Trade Assurance. We'll investigate and offer a fair solution (replacement/refund) immediately.
售后投诉先共情再要证据（图/视频+订单号），全程走 Trade Assurance 留痕；不在平台外承诺私下赔付；质量问题先内部核验再给方案，避免口头承诺超出权限。

brand.d: 台州爱以思休闲用品有限公司 (Taizhou Aiyisi Leisure Products Co., Ltd.)
专注户外 PP 编织地垫的 12 年 ODM 工厂，环保再生材料 + 双面可逆设计，主攻欧美商超与 RV 露营市场。
户外地垫 / RV 房车垫 / 露台垫 / 沙滩野餐垫 / 圆形地垫 / 浴室垫 / 宠物垫 / 祈祷垫
北美 · 西欧 · 大洋洲 · 中东 · 南欧
TÜV Rheinland 认证 · 户外地毯类目 #1 Best Seller · 服务 Aldi/Lidl/Home Depot/K-mart
波西米亚曼陀罗、几何条纹、摩洛哥花纹、航海主题；大地色系与高饱和撞色并存，适配欧美庭院与露营审美。
